creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
I did not ask for this port to be deprecated.  I was not consulted
about deprecating this port.  I object strongly to the high-handed way
this committer is behaving.  While RTx-Shredder may be built in
functionality with rt38, it is not built in to rt36 and I've got a
number of rt36 installations to support which aren't going to be
upgraded any time soon.
